pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 104: doc.save() writes to this exact path; export_result.sh and verifier.py reference this path
export_result.sh line 10 and verifier.py line 126 both reference this exact path as the expected output location
setup_task.sh line 107 writes ground truth to this path; export_result.sh line 72 copies from this location to /tmp/roster_ground_truth.json for verifier access
setup_task.sh lines 63-64: 'for i in range(1, 51):' generates exactly 50 employee records (emp_id E1001 through E1050)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses 50 synthetic employee records generated programmatically with random first/last names, SSNs, emails, and departments. Input file is '/home/ga/Documents/employee_roster_sensitive.odt' created during task setup. Ground truth containing original PII values is stored at '/var/lib/task_data/roster_ground_truth.json' with fields: id, original_ssn, last_4 (of SSN), username, and original_email. SSNs are randomly generated in format ###-##-#### (area code 100-899, group 10-99, serial 1000-9999). Emails use format firstname.lastname@domain with domains: legacy-systems.net, corp-mail.org, enterprise.com, internal.io, web-services.co.uk. Expected output file is '/home/ga/Documents/roster_sanitized.odt'.
